rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §29.306, which governs parental and advocate involvement in education of students who are deaf or hard of hearing.
quote: A student who is deaf or hard of hearing must have an education in which the student's parents or legal guardians and advocates for the student's parents or legal guardians are involved in determining the extent, content, and purpose of programs.
_note: No overlap between proposed tax exemption change and this education provision.
